backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining types and logic for a social media script generator, including storing scripts in a Set, generating placeholder script content, and querying history by platform and tone.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—a settings gear icon opening the Developer Control Center and a reduced View History button gap—to their relevant files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in styling, state management, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the Inter font from Google Fonts and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing platform, topic, tone, and history state; orchestrates script generation flow and renders all major UI sections including the Footer with a tightened View History button margin.
frontend/src/components/DeveloperControl: Modal dialog component for admins to view current Gemini and Groq API keys, enter new keys with password visibility toggles, and save them via the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component rendering a copyright line with a settings gear icon positioned 10px above it and aligned far right, which opens the DeveloperControlCenter modal on click with a purple hover glow.
frontend/src/components/GenerateButton.t: Full-width button component that triggers script generation, showing a spinner during loading and a purple box-shadow glow at rest.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header displaying the MultiScript AI title and a Diamond icon button that opens the Pro upgrade modal.
frontend/src/components/HistoryTab.tsx: Displays a sorted list of previously generated scripts fetched via `useGetScriptHistory`, showing platform icon, tone, date, topic, and a content preview for each entry.
frontend/src/components/PlatformSelector: Renders a grid of buttons for selecting a social media platform (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn), highlighting the currently selected one.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBar.tsx: Displays an animated progress bar that increments by 10% every 200ms up to 90%, used to indicate script generation processing state.
frontend/src/components/ProModal.tsx: A dialog modal advertising a $0.99/month 'MultiScript Pro' upgrade, listing premium features with a call-to-action button.
frontend/src/components/ScriptCard.tsx: Renders a generated script broken into Hook, Body, Call to Action, and Hashtags sections, with copy-to-clipboard and share functionality.
frontend/src/components/ToneSelector.tsx: Renders pill-shaped buttons for selecting a script tone (Hype, Professional, Funny), visually highlighting the active selection.
frontend/src/components/TopicInput.tsx: A labeled textarea component for entering a script topic or idea, with a descriptive placeholder.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for generating scripts, fetching script history, retrieving admin API keys, and setting admin API keys via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines dark-mode OKLCH CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds utility classes for glassmorphism, purple glow, and animated color-shift effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends border radius, fonts, and keyframe animations (accordion, pulse-glow), and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (schema v1.0.0) tracking existing features and pending feature requests for the MultiScript AI app, including a settings gear icon and layout spacing adjustment.
